parameterdescription.para: flag copy of the included Convolution object.

briefdescription.para: Destruction of the data members of a ConvolutionData object.

Extraction of an elementary frequency distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, const std::string path, bool exhaustive=false) const
memberdef.name: ascii_write

briefdescription.para: Writing of a ConvolutionData object in a file at the spreadsheet format.

Data structure corresponding to a convolution of discrete distributions.
